evidence.claim: Used Kubeflow, Elasticsearch, OpenSearch, LlamaIndex, OpenCV, Vector Search, Agile, Weaviate, Vue.js, FAISS, Pinecone, Hugging Face Transformers, Qdrant, Databricks, LoRA, LangChain, and Information Retrieval
evidence.source_text: Skills: Kubeflow... Elasticsearch... OpenSearch... LlamaIndex... OpenCV... Vector Search... Agile... Weaviate... Vue.js... FAISS... Pinecone... Hugging Face Transformers... Qdrant... Databricks... LoRA... LangChain... Information Retrieval

evidence.claim: Shipped first RAG-based feature and owns the evaluation framework
evidence.source_text: Recently, I shipped our first RAG-based feature this year and now own the eval framework for it.

evidence.claim: Evolved e-commerce search ranking from hand-tuned scoring to learning-to-rank model
evidence.source_text: Owned the ranking layer for an e-commerce search product, evolving it from a hand-tuned scoring function to a learning-to-rank model over 9 months.

evidence.claim: Built content recommendation system using collaborative filtering, content-based ranking, sentence-transformer embeddings, and gradient-boosted models
evidence.source_text: Built a content recommendation system... that combined collaborative filtering with content-based ranking. The system uses item-item similarity (via sentence-transformer embeddings) for cold starts and a gradient-boosted model
Built a content recommendation system serving 10M+ users

evidence.claim: Improved 7-day retention by 6% and time spent per session by 14% at Apple
evidence.source_text: The launch improved 7-day retention by 6% and time spent per session by 14%.
